rulings.Case Title: S, SUN CHU VS. ABRAHAM ROTH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion On Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 18, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT ABRAHAM ROTH Amended Notice Of Motion On Demurrer is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Waste is claimed to be "grounds under which possession is sought" and Defendant points to no authority that requires more detail as to the assertions of waste (unlike nuisance, which does require more and is not sufficiently stated on the face of the Notice; while smoking may be nuisance under certain circumstances, in this Notice smoking is not asserted as being basis for a nuisance claim or being the only basis for nuisance claim. As it stands there is no indication in the Notice of the "nature" of the asserted nuisance). = (501/CFH)
